title: Unremovable Effects
description: Makes selected status effects unremovable with Milk Bucket and lets you select items that should remove selected status effects
body:
[Requires Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

A simple mod that makes selected status effects unremovable with Milk Bucket.

This mod also lets you select items that should remove selected status effects.

All you need is a proper datapack. More info in [readme](https://github.com/Xires87/UnremovableEffects?tab=readme-ov-file#datapacks).

### Compatibility:

- compatible with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) (Milk Bottle and Hot Cocoa)
